channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: >biggest oil shock since 1973 >literally the worst case economic scenario >he STILL hasn't sold Some people just want to… — 48 replies — 192.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
>biggest oil shock since 1973 >literally the worst case economic scenario >he STILL hasn't sold Some people just want to…

Open thread • Replies: 48 • Updated: 2026-03-06 11:47 UTC

OP

>biggest oil shock since 1973
>literally the worst case economic scenario
>he STILL hasn't sold
Some people just want to lose money.

Early replies (first 3)

61942069
Iran will open the strait by the end of the week retard
they don't want to anger china and Europe

61942088
last time I checked bitcoin is mostly mined with clean coal and waterfall generators so tell me why it matters

61942092
May panic sell tomorrow. Already got fucked holding over one weekend

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61942386
>>61942281
>Makes not much of a difference.
I'd say 20% of all oil trade is significant
>>61942281
>Iran mostly exports to CHAYNA
>>they don't want to anger china
>Which already stockpiled lots of oil from Russia through india, aims to support Iran in the war and doesn't want the US to dictate its oil import prices

>The only issue is that there's shipping vessels caught in the hormuz strait.
And that the biggest exporters got lots of their refineries destroyed and currently don't feel safe continuing their operations
>Explain how this would do anything other than make the price of oil go up?
>>61942136
>the demand is increasing.
No

>>61942291
>Bro it's a bit late to "support iran in the war" sorry you missed your chance
Because of what exactly? Khamanei is gone and still Iran can operate. The US doesn't even know what its goal is besides making israel happy. Why are zogs so eager to trust sources from active war parties and its vassals?

61942457
>>61942131
>the price of something essential to the economy skyrocketing isn't a big deal
Fucking retard. The last time this happened we went through double digit inflation and stagflation.

61942465
>>61942457
Both are great for bitcoin

61942474
>>61942465
Extremely midwit post. High inflation=higher rates=number go down. You didn't actually fall for the "hedge against inflation" memes, did you?

61942558
>>61942386
>I'd say 20% of all oil trade is significant
Oh no! CHAYNA, the biggest importer through the Hormuz strait, will have its oil supply cut! THINK OF THE POOR CHAYNA MAN!
>And that the biggest exporters got lots of their refineries destroyed
Explain to me how this makes the price of oil go down...? Reducing the supply of oil increases the price, since the demand will remain the same or increase.
If there's actual prolonged war, the price will increase because war demands lots of oil.

The bearish outcome for oil would be the war stopping and everyone being happy and best friends with flowers and rainbows and hugs.
>>the demand is increasing.
>No
Yes. The demand won't decrease. It's not like people suddenly need less oil. The demand will remain the same (or increase) and the supply will decrease.
If there's 10 houses for sale and 10 people want houses, all is good.
If one of those houses blows up and now there's 9 houses and 10 people who want houses, the demand just increased because the supply is less than the demand.
It's very simple economics.

61942570
>>61942065
Au contraire, I am buying. Buying big. And will continue to do so.

61942590
>>61942386
Imagine defending the Ayatollah lol. Even Iranians hate their government.

61942628
Have fun trading in and out of crises while I just hold and buy more assets. You’re not smart. You’re going to sell, then buy in at a higher price.

61942664
>>61942590
>t. israeli propaganda victim

61942676
>>61942664
lol, I’m sure you have it all figured out.

61942720
>61942590
>Even Iranians hate their governmentEven Iranians hate their government

61942723
>>61942065
Can you buy barrels of oil and will that attract pussy if you have them in your garage

61942752
>>61942120
>Why would they?
They did for some countries. Why? So they can sell China their oil and receive whatever they need from them for their war efforts.

61942774
>>61942570
touche anon touche

61942791
I trust my president, he'll find a way :^)

61942827
>>61942281

15-20m barrel deficit is what the market is looking at. Oil went to 120 because it worried about Russia’s 3m barrels getting sanctioned at the onset of Ukraine


THE ISSUE is that the daily 15-20m barrels is EATING the current surplus in the market that makes crude fair valued at $60. Once nations use their emergency reserves and storage, crude will enter a STRUCTURAL bull market. Even if everything goes back to normal, the extra 500m barrels in storage surplus are going to significantly raise the risk premium of crude.

Long story short, this is the foundation for STRUCTURAL inflation, not cyclical. We will have 2022 redux as bond yields force tightening globally.

61942865
how do i price a decade of high inflation in?

61942869
>>61942069
you can see the future? how come you're still poor?

61943169
>>61942065
80 is cheap 200 would be a shock

61943223
>>61942065
>literally the worst case economic scenario
You mean AI bubble?

61943248
The economy will collapse in two more weeks

61943302
>>61942065
>Trump can't back off because it would be a catastrophic look for the US if they lost to Iran in a fucking week
>also kikes would never allow it because of Kiketropolis "security concerns"
Anon....what are you waiting for....? Do you WANT to lose money?

61943311
>>61942069
FPBP literally that simple

61943436
>what is covid
Oil went bonkers like a dozen times since 2020, we had literally negative crud but muh 1973

61943514
>>61942065
It is moving quicker than I thought. I sold everything yesterday. Even my oil stocks, might miss out on the upside, but I have a suspicion that if there is a crash it is going to affect everything.

61943602
>>61942069
Trust the plan
Patriots are in control!

61943631
>>61943436
>what was covid
A perfect time to buy? So by that analogy now should be a perfect time to sell because oil is going in the opposite direction

61943663
I want to short. I really want. But this stupid ass market is completely delusional and gulping Trump's tweets like good sperm.
We had yet another illustration of this just two days ago when muh insurance mechanism, strait is open, navy will proteec ur ass, trust us, and thus oil started to dump.
Which obviously was a load of fucking bullshit as tankers got hit in the meantime.
And now the narrative being pushed is Shitran's ballistic missiles launch is going down exponentially. Well, sure, but they sure as fuck didn't hit tankers with fucking ballistic missiles.
One drone. One. One a day hitting a tanker.
That's all it takes to make the strait permanently closed.

But the fucktarded market being the fucktarded ape it is, it can't see that. no, it will trust any lie from the administration to pump it.
How is anyone supposed to short in these conditions, and how much can you fuck up with price discovery before it becomes a complete catastrophe spiling out of control.
I fucking hate these retards. Everyone in this dumb market, everyone in this fucktarded administration, and basically, every fucking one.

61943678
>>61942281
>exports mostly to china
>china needs oil
>china buys oil from other suppliers
>china slurps (You)r oil btw
>it's allowed because the west needs their temu shit
>oil price skyrockets globally

61943692
>>61943663
KWAB

item.title: PREPARE FOR A BIG MARKET CRASH SOON — 34 replies — 136.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
PREPARE FOR A BIG MARKET CRASH SOON

Open thread • Replies: 34 • Updated: 2026-03-06 11:41 UTC

OP

Bye bye rate cuts

Early replies (first 3)

61938721
>>61938715
The rate cut is an order. The Fed will comply or ICE sends them to Guatemala.

61938723
the new guy will do what hes told

61938731
If a putin profile pic twitter account says so it must be true

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61938751
>>61938731
Much more credible than whatever jewish owned media you consume, tranny

61938752
China will make sure that they won't.

61938754
>>61938715
Ohnoes watammagonado? Have u got new news anon or just this old one?

61938757
>>61938751
Gas went up everywhere in the word. Included Russia where is even a shortage in some oblasts due refineries magically exploding

61938762
>>61938751
Russia is jewish owned, anon

61938786
>>61938757
If theres opportunity (even illogical one) to increase prices, why not to do that?

61938822
>world converts to catholicism
>crypto UBI
>everyone is happy
If these three things happen, it means the bible is true, since they were predicted 2k years ago.
The beast is the catholic church, who satan gave his power to, and its mark is sunday worship and its eucharist.


I have no idea how i can still be an atheist right now, but i NEED these three things.
Ok, probably only the first, since muslims and jews converting is beyond absurd.

61938866
>>61938822
Checked
Schizo sama i kneel...

61938885
Credit (especially private) markets are breaking, global central bank credit is rolling over, Hindenburg omens stacking, net savings as a % of gross national income going negative for the first time since 1929, bull steepening while the 2 year is mirroring behavioral crisis onset, 10 sigma VaR daily moves between asset class split plays on momentum moving between Korean stocks and bitcoin, bank heads messaging 2008 part deux and warning of a cyber attack from Iran, etc. Markets were going to crash anyways before anyone even mentioned Iran, this is just the narrative, just like repo blowing up in September 2019 and then March 2020 (covid) and 2001 (9/11). Oil priced in yen triggering unwind in global carry leverage will be a catalyst and spark for the rest. Look out below and buy when we're there. It's about to happen again.

61938904
>>61938822
You're misinformed. The Catholic Church is the church that Jesus Christ founded and He is the way, the truth, and the life. Give your life to the Lord and you will find true peace and eternal life.

61938922
>>61938715
get ready for fat retarded faggots crying on local news about not being able to fill up their F550 MEGASHART XXL sextuple cab dually ($1400/month payment for 96 months)

61939193
>>61938904
As an atheist, your post makes me roll my eyes, and fills me with nothing but contempt.
...But if i put myself in my possible future shoes, i am filled with dread and sadness for you, since you are bound for destruction in the fires of hell, your death eternal, as you obviously marvel after the beast.

61939200
You vill buy the electric car

61939202
>>61939193
Based

61939209
This is bidens economy you fucking bigots

61939246
>>61938904
No it isn't. The catholic church is the church that since Vatican II teaches (and still holds as dogma) that muslims are worshipping the "same god" and recently approved a bastardization of symbol of God's promise to man through Noah by way of heretically having a LGBT rainbow procession directly into the Vatican church, which (the Vatican) also now has A MUSLIM PRAYER ROOM. Popes endlessly shill and minister into the church for the "interfaith" globohomo movement, are COMPLETELY judaized and LITERALLY have the ROTHSCHILDS as the Vatican's bankers. Pope Francis participated in literally satanic religious rites publicly and said it was "for outreach," which is incoherent because early church dogma said that doing so was unforgiveable and grounds for ex-communication. Francis also said that evangelizing non-believers is "unchristian" and that the way we should spread the gospel is by being an example in communities and that Ramadan is "very important to many faiths, especially Christians." You are worshipping a synagogue of satan institution and need to find Christ who is indeed the way, the truth, and the life. You need to choose, conformity to the world and catholicism and your cultish culture identification with it, or Christ. They are mutually exclusive.

61939248
>>61938822
see
>>61939246

61939253
>>61938904
The original Catholic church maybe
Its been usurped for centuries now, anon
Tell me why there is a statue of lucifer behind the popes throne?
Why is the vaticans mass hall the mouth of a serpent?
These symbols are meaningful and hidden in plain sight

61939269
Ze future is Indians on electric bicycles commuting to work at zer pod

61939567
So cooked

61939587
>>61938715
Is it just cohencidence this coincides with CA closing refineries?

61940104
>>61938715
Wars aren't free, they'll do rate cuts and yield curve control to pay for everything. Stagflation will eat away at asset prices and savings accounts.

61940112
>>61938715
IM SCARED!

61940114
>mfw I drive a Prius

61940135
>>61938715
I voted for this

61940172

61940175
NIGGER JOCKEY JUST FLEW OVER MY HOUSE

61940828
>>61938715

THE ORACLE HAS SPOKEN.

61940861

Ok I'm going to cash.

61943680
>>61940828

item.title: It is blatantly obvious that the US will lose this war — 43 replies — 172.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
It is blatantly obvious that the US will lose this war

Open thread • Replies: 43 • Updated: 2026-03-06 11:48 UTC

OP

And that's a nothingburger

Early replies (first 3)

61942258
????? It means we bomb the shit out of them wdym

61942268
>>61942181
I hate being American over the last decade so much, all we do is lose and embarrass ourselves... how the fuck can we spend so much money and effort and lose a war with a country that has no resources? Meanwhile China will do nothing and win again and I will gave to endure all of 4chan laughing at us... I want to support China but I can't into Chinese women. Europe needs to become a superpower and dethrone China and America so I can cheer them on without reservations.

61942402
>>61942268
>how the fuck can we spend so much money and effort and lose a war with a country that has no resources?
Bombing a mountain just creates a field

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61942572
>>61942505
>I don't see any reason for israel attacking Iran except for current political differences.
Iran showed weakness, Israel struck them opportunistically.

61942633
>>61942268
have you entertained the possibility that the goal of these wars is not to win? that they are a tool to funnel public money into private pockets, indebting taxpayers against their will?

imagine if your grandchildren's grandchildren spent their lives paying down the interest from infinite war debts on israel's behalf, for wars that preceded their own births. that would be crazy haha

61942859
>>61942268
Just start culling Trump supporters it's that easy. That's how you MAGA.

61942877
>>61942434
>I think only >>>/g/ has active Chinese shills
Then you're mistaken, they're everywhere now.
>a lot if what you see here about China is more true than the mainstream cares to admit
Strong probability you're one of them.

61942881
>>61942877
I am an American poorfag but not a Chinese shill. I do really think that though.

61942900
>>61942881
say something bad about xi jingping right now

61942902
>>61942900
He looks like Winnie the Pooh, he's fat or at least has a fat face, and he's is ugly imo.

61942920
>>61942488
>So we don't even have a clear goal?
There's cryptic posts on Truth Social if that counts. However, realistically, the war goal is "Do whatever Israel wants"

61943015
>>61942859

>Yankee Doodle went to town and got stabbed by a nigger
>Always talks about his guns but never pulls the trigger

61943017
>>61943015
>>61942902
>>61942920
>>61942881
So latest news piece and Trump doesn't have time line for an end to war

61943049
>>61942181
The US has the biggest propaganda machine in the world. They never lose a war.

61943056
>>61943017
Yes he does. He's just lying.
If he told people that they were going to invade Iran for a long time and murder millions of people for Israel he would have lost in 2024.

Woodrow Wilson and FDR also lied repeatedly about staying out of the wars in Europe because it was unpopular. Its nothing new.

61943063
>>61942434
Honey, it's the age of AI. Why the fuck would the chinks not deploy its bots everywhere? That's retarded.

61943065
>>61942181
as long as it makes israel safer IT WAS WORTH IT!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!! (UNIRONICALLY)

61943069
>>61943063
Well shouldn't there be American ones then? And why would the Chinese ones be so transparent? It's very obvious when a poster is a Chinese shill usually.

61943075
>>61943056
Problem was, Hitler was a threat and by the time we joined, he took Western EU and Britain was next. After that, he'd probably mop up Russia and move to the USA.

We had a reason to join years before Pearl Harbor, but not the push it gave us.

61943094
>>61943075
>Hitler wanted to take over the whole world
So tiresome.

61943108
>>61943094
Its got to be a redditor

61943193
>>61942181
Hopefully, death to pissrael and the jewsa! Based anti anti christ mudslimes!

61943301
>>61942181
USA + Israel will win decisively. I look forward to when I can visit the middle east as a casual tourist with full safety. If you're against Greater Israel you are retarded

61943349
>>61942633
Only correct answer in this thread has zero replies.

61943365
>>61942258
Their drone production is underground, you can't bomb them to death, you have to invade or get bombed yourself
>>61943349
The goal of this war is religious. People don't want to believe that a country of Jews is fighting a religious war and I have no idea why. You have no problem believing that Sunnis and Shias are fighting for religious reasons, right? Well this is yet another country of religious zealots in the Middle East. People keep looking for practical reasons for this war. A practical person would not choose to live in Israel, only a Jewish zealot would

61943490
>>61942181
Check the oil price now

61943491
>>61943075

Retard

61943532
>>61943075
>Hitler was a threat

61943603
>>61943094
>>61943108
>>61943491

get the fuck off this board you nazi shitbags
strongman-worshipping dumbfucks who were abused as children and don't recognize it/think it was normal

61943610
>>61943075

yeah to the Jewish banking cabal

61943623
>>61943491
>>61943532
>>61943610
You guys would unironically be sterilized under Hitler for not being Chad enough. And your autismbuxx would transform into autism lethal injections

61943665
>>61943094
>The decision to declare war was made by Adolf Hitler, following two days of consultation. It has been referred to as Hitler's "most puzzling" decision of World War II.
Hitler was a Jewish puppet they used to hijack nationalism movement and destroy Germany. He was ough to lose to French, but became too successful because of German people genious, so he started undermining them at every way possible.

61943695
>>61942268
We aren’t doing total war on these goat fuckers. We wouldn’t even be fucking Iran up if those retarded sand niggers wouldn’t have been killing their citizens en masse. They were warned. Iran is a bit different from most of those goat fucking sand niggers and they have a chance to not be a mudslime shit hole.

item.title: Chainlink is honestly the most hilarious scam ever concocted. — 63 replies — 56.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
Chainlink is honestly the most hilarious scam ever concocted.

Open thread • Replies: 63 • Updated: 2026-03-06 10:49 UTC

OP

Chainlink is honestly the most hilarious scam ever concocted. At least with scams like ICP, the baggies quickly knew they were scammed, the token went to zero and they could move on with their life and try to recover.

Instead Chainlink keeps the scam going for years and years, with new "partnerships" and "news" and "integrations", all while the token does nothing. They give just enough breadcrumbs to keep the baggies holding on desperately for a pump, and they probably keep buying even more LINK tokens as well ensuring they remain poor forever as they wait for a "mega moon" that never comes.

In that way it's actually a more brutal and evil scam, but still funny. It's crazy because all they had to do was buy Bitcoin... or gold, or the S&P 500, or literally anything else.

Early replies (first 3)

61931782
fuck all stinkies :}
hate em all hate em all
think they SUUUUCK xD

61931907
>>61931684
>At least with scams like ICP, the baggies quickly knew they were scammed, the token went to zero and they could move on with their life and try to recover.
Wait a minute. You're telling me I've DCA'd into a scam all these years?

61931931
thanks for keeping this a Chainlink board

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61934584
>>61932086
correct. the boyscouts tried to dish it out, but they sure as hell can't take it

all talk, no walk

their hubris was their downfall
>>61932295

look at how low energy you are bro. you have no material, you have no gains, you have no confidence

take that L like a man

61934590
>>61932558
>Fuddies know the second Link crosses $1,000 they will immediately be hunted and tortured across the globe.


i would pay to see one of you awkward losers try to hire a hitman in real life. if by some miracle you even managed to contact one of these groups, i imagine they'd look you over, make sure no one was around, and just take your money and then disappear

at which point you'd have no other option other than to to back to larping as a badass online

61935620
take the L, stinkbots

61936147
>>61934590
>well they'll never find my suicidal porn blog entries or notice my simping after niggerdick on x
>well they'll never find out that I'm a third worlder who dropped out of business school to join a mlm scam company that got busted
>well they'll never find out what I look like
>well they'll never message people I know
>well they'll just forget I sold my stack for wormhole and linksol and that I got irrevocably fucked as a result

You thought all of those things at one stage, now everyone including you knows how incredibly incredibly retarded you are... but dw I'm sure that
>well nothing will ACTUALLY happen when some mentally ill new millionaires target me for sport

Will totally hold and you'll be perfectly fine lil fella

61938160
>>61931684
Agreed. Endless "partnerships" and paid pilots ending up providing price feeds. The entire token has zero purpose outside inserting a fee and does nothing solution wise. It doesn't even make sense but the cult of followers just ignore this and never even argue against it and act like it is getting exposure to the core product success of the company. I seriously have no idea how they can be like this if they legitimately aren't paid shills.

61938725
money talks

61938733
I built my own oracle with AI lol. Theres a reason its the price that it is. not special.

61938776
>>61938160
This is good fud

61938896
>>61938776
It is just reality, which itself turns out to be pretty good fud when the fervor dies down.

61938901
>>61932086
This. They were ENDLESSLY smug. They acted indistinguishable from indians and their coin is indistinguishable from jewish rent seeking with no utility beyond pumping sirgay's pockets while he fuck you.

61938913
>>61934590
>He thinks it would happen irl

61938917
>>61932298
Cheap linkies again? Sign me up

61938935
Chainlink is unique among shitcoins though because it's more like a cult. I can remember a few years these people spamming up every forum I frequented including places that had nothing to do with crypto or finance. A deranged cackle of midwits who became giddy at every "partnership" and "on-chain utility" thinking they were so ahead of the market and that they were geniuses. That's why they are baggies, they are too emotionally invested and their ego cannot handle accepting that they were scammed. Most people who get rugged in a shitcoin scam at least know on some level that it's a pump and dump coin but that they were just too late to enter and too late to sell.

61938954
Cardano is worse
>tfw dropped $5000 on it back when it was $3 in 2021 like a retard
>it's currently $0.40
>been holding it patiently waiting to break even to get my money back

61939099
>>61932038
you do realize that if chainlink goes to zero people will be posting about it here for years, right?

61939107
>>61932327
>>61932513
>>61932516
>that link poster who is fully all-in dca no matter what also has millions available to buy a dip
personally I love stinks

61939365
>>61936147

bro let me spell it out for you: you. just. aren't. intimidating

>duuuuuuuude i sent someone a message on facebook 3 years ago
hahahhahaha

to put it another way, you got so mad about your online cult being disrespected, you went searching online for a random dude in the netherlands, and now you spend your days thinking about him jerking off

bahahahaha

i fucking BODIED you these last few years, and it's been very hard for you to come to grips with it

but you'll eventually take it in stride, because that's what you do

that's who you are. and who is that you ask....

THE Cuckolds of crypto

61939372
>>61938776
>This is good fud

in other words

>h h hehh guys, i'm t t TOTALLY cool with this
>a all part of the p p plan

bahahhaha you aren't fooling anyone kid


you don't have to pretend here, it's anonymous
just be yourself buddy

61939406
Artemis please come back I need my hopium.

61940963
>>61939365
Yawn
No one is convinced. You can keep barking, subhuman - but it's just the barking of a bbc simp cuck who won't have any resources to hide with when the time comes. You're the property of biz which is why you're doxxed, and why you're stuck here every day trying to get people to sell because it's the only thing you can think of to do to try to increase your odds later. That's how fuckin dumb you are lmfao.

61941143
>>61940963
>Yawn

you've been yawning for years now. take a nap already kid

>No one is convinced
who exactly are you speaking for here. the chart looks pretty convinced (you're down 80)

>but it's just the barking of a bbc simp cuck who won't have any resources to hide with when the time comes.

bahahhahahhaahaha

dude you just aren't hard. how many times do i have to tell ya


>lmfao

it's not authentic to say that when you're in tears

61941730
>>61941143
Browns don't understand why white people know they are brown just by their typing. It's honestly incredibly easy to spot you. It's lame at this point. I just hope you hold Link and this is just a way to vent your frustration away. Truly sad to see

61941797
>>61932671
Yeah bro I was banking on it hitting $90 at least last year and now my life is fucked.
I'm surprising emotionally alright though but if I sat down and took the time to comprehend the opportunity cost I would want to rope immediately.

>I'm better off focusing on a high income career than waiting for this shit
This is how I'm coping too.

61942302
>>61931684
>scam
no actually
they make money and buy back the token
they have been doing 1.1 million USD buybacks every week: https://x.com/chainlink/status/2029618640916447458

61942449
5 reasons LINK will fail

1) Token necessity is unclear
Customers want reliable data/messaging, not volatility. If adoption grows, it can be structured as a service (fiat/stables, contracts, OTC), making LINK optional rather than required.

2) Partnerships ≠ production
Many “partnerships” are pilots, programs, or compatibility announcements with limited measurable throughput. The market can end up pricing logo density instead of fee density.

3) Value accrual may bypass holders
Even if usage exists, economics can flow mainly to node operators and negotiated counterparties, while token holders get narrative upside without proportional cash-flow linkage.

4) Staking doesn’t prove demand
Yield matters only if funded by sustainable fees. If rewards are modest or subsidy-dependent, staking is retention/marketing, not an economic flywheel.

5) Commoditization risk
Oracles/messaging can be competed by alternatives, specialized providers, rollup-native solutions, or “good enough” centralized feeds. If switching is feasible, pricing power compresses.

What would falsify this bear case: multi-quarter, auditable growth in fee revenue tied to on-chain usage; clear mechanics forcing LINK acquisition/holding; scaled CCIP/oracle volumes with transparent unit economics; staking materially funded by fees.

61943307
It's over bros, our Chainlink journey ends here. The Great Reset timeline has come at a crossroad with humanity. The magic is gone, the memes are stale, the shills have been uncovered, the agendas laid bare for all to see, i-i-it's over marines...only tears from here.

61943363
linkies deserve the following: pain, misery, poverty, and humiliation :} (but mostly poverty, tbqh)

61943390
>>61942449
Actually based AI

61943409
what a weird ICP thread

61943560
>>61940963
Bro you got owned take the L and move on Adem won simple as

item.title: Top of the dead cat bounce? — 42 replies — 33.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
Top of the dead cat bounce?

Open thread • Replies: 42 • Updated: 2026-03-06 10:40 UTC

OP

We just got denied at 73.8K, the top of March 2024's first selloff. This will be a VERY IDEAL time to short, if we really drop and didn't break out for at least 3 days from that line.

Early replies (first 3)

61938413
>>61938409
for newfags, who don't understand what i mean, there's always 1 event that follows a dead cat bounce at the end of every bullrun on every market

61938418
>>61938409
>>61938413

61938423
no m8 it's all bs everything is it's just some richfags screwing with everyone because they're spiritually dead and can't enjoy life any other way. the richfags will pump and dump for the lols regardless of the chart patterns

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61938662
>>61938640

61938665

61938672

61938676
>>61938430

61938691
>>61938640
pamp up the jam
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=IW_ZnjSfjEI

61938728
>>61938665
It can be really dodgy when institutions do it. They go on the news and try to scare the general public into selling and basically just make stuff up. I won't be shorting this time I don't think, I don't have a lot of money and not enough time to follow it a lot. I'm more just waiting for a discount and then will start dca'ing for a while into BTC and probably some other the other lower market cap coins. Might end up missing the bottom if it doesn't drop but I'm ok with that right now.

61938756
>>61938409
>muh golden cross muh death cross
sad! don't act like you're doing python studies on what happens after these events, moron!

61938891
>>61938728
If shorting is not your cup of tea then so be it. After all, the point is to gain profit yea? Personally, ill DCA when we're below 50K

>>61938756
I never said anything about golden cross or death cross. I also didnt mention anything about python?

Are you perhaps coping because you missed the top, and throw all your anger towards me? I just wanna help m8, but the decision to get rich and leave India is up to you and yours only

61938939
>>61938891
Hope you're right anon because I want to all-in on alts when this is over with

61938953
>>61938409
>Top of the dead cat bounce?
its already in

61938976
Charting does not work. I dont know what else to say. You can do a 50/200 average and buy when it goes too low.
By the time the 50 picks up over the 200, the price will be average and you will be mad you didnt buy some. No way to predict

61938993
>>61938953
We shall see m8. We shall see

>>61938976
It works for me. Also i didnt use 50/200 to buy and sell. I use it to help me draw accurate meme lines. My long and short positions comes from the lines, and my timing to buy comes from Stoch RSI and regular RSI.

Again it works charmingly for me

61939033
>>61938891
>After all, the point is to gain profit yea?
Yeah, I've tried it a bunch of times in the past and will likely try it again. I don't think there's anything wrong with individual investors doing it. I just meant the massive investors that try to manipulate the market on a large scale. The whole gamestop thing highlighted a bunch of it, how the hedge funds manipulate people etc.

61939040
>>61939033
Then good luck m8. Me, imma try to short to gain more fund for DCA ing in the future

61939078
>>61938409
This is not the ideal time to short. You want to short at 85-90k. You're literally shorting the bottom of the range. If you're shorting with 4x or less leverage, then fine. But any more than that and you're going to get liquidated on the test of 90k.
Just wait for the test of 90k and short with a stoploss at 100k
>>61938640
Praise the pamp

61939098
>>61939078
>you're going to get liquidated on the test of 90k.
Bruh there's this thing called "stop loss" limit, like you literally just said? If you wanna short now, just put the stop loss at 74K or a bit higher

61939144
>>61939078
The high probability short is at 90k -> 20k.
>>61939078
You're just asking to be stopped out though since there's a huge block of stops exactly in that price range currently. Unless you're just shorting to 70k or something around there. But, there's structure forming between 72k and 74k, so it could just range here and stop out the shorts again.

Not a good short if you ask me.

61939150
>>61939098
Whoops, replied to myself too many times lol
>>61939098
Second half was meant for you.

61939280
>>61938993
I’ve back tested the meme lines and averages, and they do not beat buy and hold over the long run. At all. So you could potentially use an indicator for entry, but if you continue to do it you will lose BTC trade by trade.

61939300
>>61939280
this is why coin-m contracts are good, all you have to do is get modest returns and you'll be outperforming a buy and hold

61939558
>>61939280
That's just not true. You can seriously outperform buy and hold with trendlines and moving averages, even with BTCs tx fees. But you need to have patience both for buying back in and selling. If you sell too soon, you'll just be backing back in at break even, or slightly at a loss, especially with tx fees.

(for this example you have $100 just as an illustration)
Buy at 18k
0.00555 sats owned
Sell at 24k
$130 owned
Buy at 20k
0.0065 sats owned
Sell half at 29k
$95.55 plus 0.00325 sats owned
Sell half at 31k (hold 25% of bag)
$145.925 plus 0.001625 sats owned
Buy at 25k
0.005837 sats bought plus 0.00325
0.009087 sats owned @ 25k = $227.175. 2.2x when the market is only up 50%
Literally nearly doubled your bag in just a few swings using moving averages and the real breakout hasn't even occurred yet.

The problem is people all in or all out. You can't FOMO you just have to trust the lines. You can't just use one line. You need resistance lines, you need support lines, you need MA's AND you need trendlines.
When all those lines converge, you get a confluence of events and that's when you buy or sell. If you only use one line, you're going to be probably worse off.
A MA on its own is kind of useless.

61939617
>>61939558
I don't know how to short correctly or even half the terminology your using, what are the best resources I can read to equip me to short properly ?

61939643
I cant believe it, a legit TA discussion after so long. Man it feels nostalgic. Ahem, anyway...

>>61939144
>>61939150
What you both said actually kinda correct. There's a potential loss of BTC trade by trade. I usually risk losing 2% every time, with a chance gaining 10x each time i put a position. Thats just how it is to trade m8. And it worked for me really well

But as i said earlier on >>61938434, i did have position since 84K. Im just saying, in trader's perspective, its a good place to put short position now, if you missed out on the 90K drop weeks ago.

>>61939280
I did both. 2 Account: for hold, and swing for relatively quick cash (to fund my hobbies and personal projects)

>>61939558
Your last paragraph is right also. You need to use multiple line and plan your exit strategy

61939650
>>61939617
Use future trade, do the exact opposite of what you do when you long/buy

61939985
>>61939617
Uhh, you can find videos online that explain it. Just look up "technical analysis 101" videos. Rayner Teo has easy to understand explanations.
You can also just google technical analysis 101
https://chartschool.stockcharts.com/table-of-contents/overview/technical-analysis-101?/?utm_source=google&gad_campaignid=21393841896

But honestly, shorting is significantly more difficult than longing.
>>61939643
>its a good place to put short position now, if you missed out on the 90K drop weeks ago.
I wouldn't call it good, just alright kinda low probability though. A good short would be if it hits ~90k again within the week or two without testing 65k.

I see what you're going for since it's been ranging +10% -10%, though. But I really believe the break of the top of the range means that is done (for now).

61940040
>>61939985
Yes i agree... IF it hits 90K again. If it wont? At least for me by that logic its a pretty good chance. Ngl tho if we go near 90K again, i will ape on a one massive short kek, using the exact same strategy as your post

61940136
>>61940040
If you want my two cents, I think there's about an 70-80% chance it hits roughly 90k before it touches 65k again.
Just going off patterns alone the same thing is happening in reverse.

If I were shorting I'd be closing right now. But that's just me. (I'm actually opening longs)

61942941
>>61940136
Ill keep that in mind m8. If it reach 90K again, i will ape hard on my short.

>If I were shorting I'd be closing right now
Perhaps i should put a take profit on my 84K short stack, if the chart goes above 74K

61943146
>>61942941
Why sweat shorts? Stake your BTC on Babylon natively and keep stacking while you wait. Let it work for you anon.

61943548
>>61943146
I'm not doing that

item.title: The US has 10 days — 88 replies — 11.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
The US has 10 days

Open thread • Replies: 88 • Updated: 2026-03-06 04:06 UTC

OP

The US has 10 days to clear the strait of Hormuz or global markets will crash (not a hyperbole)

At first, markets brushed off the conflict as another 12 day war. However, realization is setting in that Iran is actually capable of deterring passage through the Hormuz strait by 90%.

The problem is that every day that goes on is the equivalent of shutting off 10+ billion barrels of oil every single day. As storage becomes full, producers are forced to shut in production, which takes 2 weeks to restart. Thankfully, most of the world is fine for 1-2 weeks without gulf oil. After that, problems begin.

Oil will reprice a geopolitical premium and $100 is LOW for the magnitude of production shutdown.

What happens: bond yields will roar to new highs as a huge wave of inflation begins. All rate cut probabilities get removed, and you will see the traditional end of the business cycle, high oil prices will turn growth into recession for most economies. None of this is priced in equities. And the longer it goes on, the higher likelihood of it happening.

How to end it? Trump has fallen for a Trump. There is no way to clear irans fast mountain ranges littered with AD and missile silos, thus tankers will keep getting shot in the Hormuz strait. The only way is to put troops on the ground.

Don’t really care if you think I’m a permabear or a doomer, I’m just giving you a warning that for whatever reason, equities don’t want to price in. They don’t understand that this is an existential war for Iran, it’s not some “geopolitical dip”.

Pic is Asian jet fuel prices

Early replies (first 3)

61938343
>>61938341
Slurp XOP? Wut do

61938344
So should I sell my TLT?

61938345
>>61938341
>I’m just giving you a warning that for whatever reason, equities don’t want to price in
Trump spent all of last year insider trading and TACOing so he's not trustworthy anymore

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61939954
>>61938406
>>Trump occupies Iran - 10 years of insurgency
Iranians will never do an insurgency and the people who think they're like afghanistan fundamentally don't understand iranians.

61939974
>>61939954
I remember morons saying Iraqis were soft handed state coddled urbanites. morons (Republicans) never learn.

61939987
>>61939954
they're worse, same geography but more numerous and more prideful

61940017
>>61938578

61940028
>>61939974
I don't remember anyone ever saying that, maybe you're making things up because you're retarded.

>>61939987

61940029
>>61939905

61940093

61940570

61941344

61941358

61941381

61941414

61941712

61942683
>>61938601

61942707
I don't mind if Israel and the US want to be retarded in their own little sandboxes, but why do they have to drag the rest of the world into it

61942764
>>61938506
The only thing that matters is that the US is the first to achieve AGI. >>61938487
Is on to something here. This move, which seems to be such a blunder, is the only thing that can set China and the EU back enough for the US to win the AI race.

61942831
>>61938341
>The US has 10 days to clear the strait of Hormuz
No.
>or global markets will crash (not a hyperbole)
Nobody cares.
> on is the equivalent of shutting off 10+ billion barrels of oil every single day.
Ok, sot there's 1/4 of all oil that isn't getting to EU and UK.
So, oil price will go up.
>Oil will reprice a geopolitical premium and $100 is LOW
It'll be $100 - 150 .
I guess EU and UK should have not sanctioned Russia, tough luck now.

61942837
>>61938345
Wholly retard.
Trump made US oil independent during first term, and US is top 3 oil producing country now.
Oil price going up means US gov will have more money to balance the budget.

61942844
>>61942831

BOND YIELDS will crash the economy, not oil itself. With a structural 15m daily barrel deficit oil will go up every week. The only way to destroy demand is recession, oil will go up until it reaches the breaking point for global growth and blows everything up.

There is no feelings or opinions to this. Shutting the strait is a 15m barrel deficit. Ask any energy expert that that does to prices. It’s 150-200

61942850
>>61942837

Has nothing to do with US energy production because crude is a global market. Just ask yourself what would happen if the 30 year yield went to 7%. That’s a 30-45% dump in equities

61942851
>>61942837
I'm sure Joe Shcmo on the street is going to be happy paying 2 dollars a litre to fund Israel. Do you NEET retards really live in such a vacuum?

61942854
Crypto will pump. The thesis for crypto has always been based on the collapse of the system

61942897
>>61942854
Crypto is fiat with extra steps
No fiat, no crypto

item.title: Day 1650 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M — 41 replies — 8.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Day 1650 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M

Open thread • Replies: 41 • Updated: 2026-03-06 07:08 UTC

OP

Day 1650 of snailposting every day until BTC is at 1M

Early replies (first 3)

61913936
